testcase.name: test_01_gps_within_radius_uses_configured_radius
testcase.failure: tests/test_gps_radius_review_timeout_iter104.py:101: in test_01_gps_within_radius_uses_configured_radius assert part_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_nearby_gps_does_not_count_as_close
testcase.failure: tests/test_gps_radius_review_timeout_iter104.py:186: in test_02_nearby_gps_does_not_count_as_close "invitation_token": participant.get("invitation_token"), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_03_manual_checkin_only_requires_review
testcase.failure: tests/test_gps_radius_review_timeout_iter104.py:243: in test_03_manual_checkin_only_requires_review assert response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
